news.title:
CBI court convicted 8, including 3 retired PNB officials, in a 2016 loan fraud case causing Rs 1.57 crore loss.
The accused received rigorous imprisonment, fines up to Rs 1 lakh, and Jalpa Enterprise Pvt Ltd was fined Rs 50,000.
news.summary:
CBI court convicted 8, including 3 retired PNB officials, in a 2016 loan fraud case causing Rs 1.57 crore loss.
The accused received rigorous imprisonment, fines up to Rs 1 lakh, and Jalpa Enterprise Pvt Ltd was fined Rs 50,000.

news.title:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.
news.summary:
PSU Bank index gains 4.5% as bond yields cool off; Union Bank, Bank of Maharashtra lead with 5% surge.
SBI, PNB, Canara Bank among others rise 4-5%; India's 10-year bond yield drops 15bps to 6.9%.

news.title:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.
news.summary:
Banking stocks dropped post-Q4 updates; Nifty Bank index fell 0.9%.
Kotak, IndusInd declined over 2%, ICICI, PNB, IDFC First fell 1%+.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains 'Underweight' on Punjab National Bank, sets target price at ₹100.
Cites 2.5% QoQ loan growth, 13% YoY loan rise, 9.2% deposit growth, and LDR at 72.5%.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains 'Underweight' on Punjab National Bank, sets target price at ₹100.
Cites 2.5% QoQ loan growth, 13% YoY loan rise, 9.2% deposit growth, and LDR at 72.5%.

news.title:
Citi suggests selling PNB with a target price of ₹115/share.
PNB's loan-to-deposit ratio is 73.7%, showing strong liquidity and stable growth.
news.summary:
Citi suggests selling PNB with a target price of ₹115/share.
PNB's loan-to-deposit ratio is 73.7%, showing strong liquidity and stable growth.

news.title: Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight rating on PNB with a target price of 100.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight rating on PNB with a target price of 100.

news.title:
PSU banks gain investor focus post-Q4 updates; steady growth in deposits, advances seen.
BoB, PNB, Union Bank report YoY/QoQ growth; BoB dips 0.8%, PNB up 0.4%, Union Bank gains 0.6%.
news.summary:
PSU banks gain investor focus post-Q4 updates; steady growth in deposits, advances seen.
BoB, PNB, Union Bank report YoY/QoQ growth; BoB dips 0.8%, PNB up 0.4%, Union Bank gains 0.6%.

news.title:
PNB reports 10.8% YoY global business growth; CASA ratio at 73.7%. RBL Bank sees 24% YoY business rise; RBI approves 74% stake sale to Emirates NBD.
Tata Motors PV Q4 wholesales drop 14.5% YoY; RVNL secures ₹242 crore order. Emami to fully acquire Axiom Ayurveda for ₹200 crore.
news.summary:
PNB reports 10.8% YoY global business growth; CASA ratio at 73.7%. RBL Bank sees 24% YoY business rise; RBI approves 74% stake sale to Emirates NBD.
Tata Motors PV Q4 wholesales drop 14.5% YoY; RVNL secures ₹242 crore order. Emami to fully acquire Axiom Ayurveda for ₹200 crore.

news.title:
Bombay HC rejects plea to name Debjyoti Dutta as accused in PNB fraud.
Nitin Shahi of Gitanjali Gems filed the plea in ₹3,000-cr PNB case.
news.summary:
Bombay HC rejects plea to name Debjyoti Dutta as accused in PNB fraud.
Nitin Shahi of Gitanjali Gems filed the plea in ₹3,000-cr PNB case.

news.title:
PNB Housing Finance's promoters made no share encumbrance in FY25-26.
Audit Committee informed; compliance with SEBI Regulation 31(4-5) ensured.
news.summary:
PNB Housing Finance's promoters made no share encumbrance in FY25-26.
Audit Committee informed; compliance with SEBI Regulation 31(4-5) ensured.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank disclosed no encumbrance on its shareholding in PNB Gilts for FY ending 31.03.2026.
Disclosure complies with SEBI Takeover Regulations, informed to PNB Gilts' Audit Committee.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank disclosed no encumbrance on its shareholding in PNB Gilts for FY ending 31.03.2026.
Disclosure complies with SEBI Takeover Regulations, informed to PNB Gilts' Audit Committee.

news.title:
Govt holds 70.08% shares in Punjab National Bank with no pledge.
No collateral on promoter's stake disclosed per SEBI norms for FY2026.
news.summary:
Govt holds 70.08% shares in Punjab National Bank with no pledge.
No collateral on promoter's stake disclosed per SEBI norms for FY2026.

news.title:
PNB, Union Bank, and IDFC FIRST Bank report credit growth surpassing deposit growth in March quarter.
This trend highlights sustained loan demand amid tight liquidity conditions.
news.summary:
PNB, Union Bank, and IDFC FIRST Bank report credit growth surpassing deposit growth in March quarter.
This trend highlights sustained loan demand amid tight liquidity conditions.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank reports strong Q4 loan growth and improved CASA ratio.
Global business sees an 11% increase in the quarter.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank reports strong Q4 loan growth and improved CASA ratio.
Global business sees an 11% increase in the quarter.

news.title:
PNB's advances rose 12.2% YoY to Rs 11.96T in FY26, outpacing deposits.
Central Bank and PNB achieved double-digit credit growth, deposits grew 9.1% YoY.
news.summary:
PNB's advances rose 12.2% YoY to Rs 11.96T in FY26, outpacing deposits.
Central Bank and PNB achieved double-digit credit growth, deposits grew 9.1% YoY.

news.title:
PNB reports domestic advances of Rs 11.96T, up from Rs 10.7T YoY.
Global gross advances rise to Rs 12.6T from Rs 11.2T YoY.
news.summary:
PNB reports domestic advances of Rs 11.96T, up from Rs 10.7T YoY.
Global gross advances rise to Rs 12.6T from Rs 11.2T YoY.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank's global business reached Rs 28.91 lakh crore, growing 2.9%.
Domestic deposits rose 3.3% to Rs 15.97 lakh crore; advances grew 2.5%-3.1%.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank's global business reached Rs 28.91 lakh crore, growing 2.9%.
Domestic deposits rose 3.3% to Rs 15.97 lakh crore; advances grew 2.5%-3.1%.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.

news.title:
Bombay HC rules bank recovery laws can't override PMLA provisions.
Judgment affirms govt's primacy in action against proceeds of crime.
news.summary:
Bombay HC rules bank recovery laws can't override PMLA provisions.
Judgment affirms govt's primacy in action against proceeds of crime.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank announces changes in Statutory Central Auditors for FY 2025-26.
M/s P S D & Associates ceases as SCA; four firms continue as SCAs as per RBI directive.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank announces changes in Statutory Central Auditors for FY 2025-26.
M/s P S D & Associates ceases as SCA; four firms continue as SCAs as per RBI directive.
